metadata.title: Space Engineers vanilla and DLC prefab inventory
notes: Prefab source ownership is not declared directly in prefab files; source_origin is inferred from folder names and known scenario/update folders.
DLC usage is inferred from cube block definitions that declare <DLC> and from armor skin asset modifiers that declare <DLC>.
The matching .sbcB5 files are game-generated prefab cache files and are counted but not parsed.
Scenario world save grids outside Content/Data/Prefabs are not expanded here; this inventory focuses on reusable prefab definitions plus voxel map storage definitions.

Space Engineers official store DLC list

notes: This file exists with a .sbc extension but is not well-formed XML in the local Steam install. The adjacent .sbcB5 cache exists.
